fun (X Y Z : ℕ+) (f : X ⟶ Y) (g : Y ⟶ Z) => by
    -- Use the properties of `map` to ensure composition is preserved
    have h1 : map (X.f) (Z) = map (X.f) (Z) := rfl
    have h2 : map (Y.f) (Z) = map (Y.f) (Z) := rfl
    have h3 : map (X.f) (Y.f) = map (X.f) (Y.f) := rfl
    sorry
